settings.hero_subtitle: PAWD started in 2021 in a spare bedroom in Sydney, with a dog called Jake snoring in the corner. This is what happened next.
settings.story_title:
We Couldn't Find
What We Wanted.
So We Built It.
settings.story_p1: After years of buying pet accessories that fell apart, looked cheap, or just felt wrong — we decided the problem wasn't about budget. It was about expectation. The pet industry had settled for "good enough" for too long.
settings.story_p2: We wanted collars made from the same Italian leather as the bags we saved up for. Beds with the same care for support as the mattresses we spent on ourselves. Bowls that looked like they belonged in the home — not hidden in a corner because they were ugly.
settings.story_p3: So we spent two years developing relationships with small-batch suppliers and artisans across Australia, Italy and Portugal. We tested products on our own dogs. We rejected more than we kept. In 2023, PAWD launched — and we haven't looked back.
settings.promise_title: We'll never stop asking: is this actually good enough for the animal wearing it?
settings.promise_sub: Because that's the only question that matters. Everything else follows from there.

settings.title: Quality First. Always.
settings.body: We use materials that improve with age — full-grain leathers that develop a patina, natural fibres that soften, ceramics that last decades. If something doesn't meet the standard we'd hold ourselves to as consumers, it doesn't go into the range.

settings.title: Honest Sourcing.
settings.body: Every material in our range is traced to its origin. We work with small-batch suppliers who share our values — no mass factories, no compromises on conditions. We can tell you exactly where every collar, bowl and toy comes from.

settings.title: Design That Lasts.
settings.body: We don't chase trends. Our colour palette and aesthetic are built to be timeless — because a collar that goes out of fashion in a season is one you'll replace. Our products are designed to live alongside your home for years.
